title: Death And Taxes It Takes A Village To Maintain Wealth
section_path: Death And Taxes It Takes A Village To Maintain Wealth
section_path_text: Death And Taxes It Takes A Village To Maintain Wealth
summary:
Main
The three things I'm thinking about this week
We don't have any evidence to say that this Santa rally signals the beginning of a sustainable bull market just yet. Into 2024 though, a bull market prompted by the cessation of Quantitative Tightening is a real possibility. In terms of the UK budget: The Fiscal Drag (no change in the income bands) balances out the negative fiscal effects of the Chancellor's giveaways.
